vision.observations: The image shows a severe burn on the skin, characterized by redness, blistering, and possible signs of tissue damage. The affected area appears to be significant in size.
vision.primary_concern: severe burn requiring immediate medical attention
immediate_actions: Do not apply any creams or ointments to the burn
Keep the affected area clean and covered with a sterile, non-adhesive dressing
vision.patient_message: You have a severe burn that requires immediate medical attention. Do not apply any creams or ointments to the burn. Keep the affected area clean and covered with a sterile, non-adhesive dressing until you can see a doctor.

treatment_plan.action: Seek immediate medical evaluation and treatment
Follow doctor's instructions for wound care and pain management

home_care: Avoid exposing the burn to sunlight
Keep the burn area clean and dry
Follow doctor's instructions for dressing changes
warning_signs: Signs of infection (e.g., pus, increased redness, fever)
Changes in skin color or texture
